reviews.review_description:
I have the Ace controller for Quest 3 and it almost works.  (The other users may have been using Ace with Quest 2.)

The quest controller sits upside down and backwards into the Ace handset.  So pitch around -100 points it forward. But the gun grip is pointing upwards, so we need ability to rotate that axis too. (not yaw)

Also, the Ace handset does not pull the trigger all the way down, so we would need your app detect/set for partial press of trigger button.

But, I had a lot of fun using your app without the handset, and hopefully will be able to use it eventually if you are able to add those configurations.

Thanks!!!

I don't know if it's accurate, but I like it. Awesome with friends. I'd like to know if it's possible to play with an Ace handset... 
Thank you very much!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!

I don't own an "Ace Controller" yet, but according to other users, it seems that you can play using one.

We are currently developing a feature update to further enhance your gaming experience. Please look forward to it!

reviews.review_description: The game looks really fun but the controller are a bit weird because instead of the guns being pointed forward its pointed at me so i have to flip my controller in a weird way which gets uncomfortable for the first 5 seconds... No clue how to fix it

developer_response.body:
I see, this is the first time I've seen a case where the muzzle is pointing incorrectly. Thank you for the feedback.

The next update will include a feature that allows for fine-tuning of the position and angle, so please wait a little longer.

reviews.review_description:
Hi Author, yes I am able to play with Ace vr handset but the pistol is way over the actual handset so could you give us the option to move the pistol down or up please. Great work by the way and thank you very much.
Vic

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.

We'll be adding a feature to adjust the gun's position vertically in our next major update, so please look forward to it!

reviews.review_description: Really not much to this game. Shoot the ball on the stick. The visuals make you feel confined. The aim is a bit wierd. I enjoyed it for 2 mins.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.

This app was originally created for stage practice in Japanese airsoft competitions, so it has a fairly simple design.

The next update will include features that allow for fine-tuning of position and angle, as well as MR (Mixed Reality) functionality, which will enable you to adjust your aim and play in a more spacious environment.

Please wait a little longer for the update.

reviews.review_description: It's a great shooting simulator for steel challenge shooters

developer_response.body: Thank you for the wonderful compliment!
Thank you for the wonderful compliment!

reviews.review_description: Oh I think I'm going to spend some time on this one

developer_response.body: Please look forward to the next update.

reviews.review_description: I love this game accuracy and speed

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing!
Stay tuned for more feature updates!

reviews.review_description: A fantastic game developer who listens to people's wishes. For me this game is the top right now! especially if you have a (k3d gun ;-)) thank you very much for your work and I hope there will be further improvements in the near future, eg: this would all look good in an outdoor photo realistic environment!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review and kind words!
When I looked up the "k3d gun," I learned for the first time that it's an accessory that can be used with the Oculus controller upside down! I'm going to buy one right away!

In the next update (Ver. 1.15), you can now adjust pitch (-180 to 180 degrees) by moving the right stick up or down, and yaw (-180 to 180 degrees) by moving the left stick up or down. (To ensure precise pitch and yaw adjustments, you will need to adjust each controller separately.)

The reason why the game's background is designed to be surrounded by walls is that it makes it easier to see the bullet holes (points of impact) when a bullet misses, and also reduces the load on the graphics.

The idea of ​​presenting the game's background in an outdoor, photorealistic environment is great! We'll consider it for future development. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Super game, very easy. Need MR version in future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your encouraging review!
Introducing MR stages is a great idea!
We'll consider it as one of the future updates!

reviews.review_title: Best at the moment for gun sim !!!
reviews.review_description: Speed shooting dev is very nice and intelligent and indeed we can use the gun from k3d as it is menat to be, search: k3design point store

developer_response.body: Thank you! Your review is very encouraging!
